nasb.text: You water its furrows abundantly, You settle its ridges, You soften it with showers, You bless its growth.

esv.text: You water its furrows abundantly, settling its ridges, softening it with showers, and blessing its growth.

cnv.text: 你灌溉地的犁溝，潤平犁脊， 又降雨露使地鬆軟， 並且賜福給地上所生長的。

ccb.text: 你降下甘霖，浇透垄沟， 滋润垄背，使地松软、 长出庄稼。

csbs.text: 你润泽它的犁沟，平整它的犁脊； 你用细雨使地松软，祝福其中所生长的。
